languages.text: "Я никогда не мечтал о подобном, Ваша Светлость. Но я принес присягу и принимаю назначение".
"I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."
languages.original_text: "Я никогда не мечтал о подобном, Ваша Светлость. Но я принес присягу и принимаю назначение".

traits.locale_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."
"I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."
"I never dreamed of such a thing, Lord Captain. But I took the oath and I accept the post."
"I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."
"I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

languages.text: 「艦長閣下、そんなことは夢にも思いませんでした。ですが、私は誓いを立てました。この任をお受けします」
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Lord Captain. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長閣下、そんなことは夢にも思いませんでした。ですが、私は誓いを立てました。この任をお受けします。」

languages.text: « Je n'ai jamais rêvé d'un tel poste, Votre Seigneurie, mais maintenant que j'ai prêté serment, je ne peux qu'accepter. »
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai jamais rêvé d'un tel poste, Votre Seigneurie, mais maintenant que j'ai prêté serment, je ne peux qu'accepter. »

languages.text: "Böyle bir şeyi hayal bile edemezdim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Fakat yemin ettim ve vazifeyi kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle bir şeyi hayal bile edemezdim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Fakat yemin ettim ve vazifeyi kabul ediyorum."

languages.text: "Das hätte ich mir niemals erträumt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber ich habe den Eid abgelegt und nehme den Posten an."
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: "Das hätte ich mir niemals erträumt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber ich habe den Eid abgelegt und nehme den Posten an."

languages.text: «Nunca había soñado con algo así, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero presté el juramento y acepto el puesto».
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: «Nunca había soñado con algo así, mi{mf|lord|lady}, pero presté el juramento y acepto el puesto».

languages.text: “我从未奢望过这个职位，大人。但我既已宣誓，便愿意接受这个任命。”
languages.original_text: "I never dreamed of such a thing, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But I took the oath and I accept the post."

traits.locale_text: “我从未奢望过这个职位，大人。但我既已宣誓，便愿意接受这个任命。”
